title: cyclosorus conspersus
intro: Cyclosorus conspersus, also known as the Limestone fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The leaves of Cyclosorus conspersus can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
